steps.title: Apply growth percentages to get 2020 counts
steps.content:
To model the 2020 values, apply the growth percentages. A $p\%$ growth means multiplying by $1 + \frac{p}{100}$:
  • Advanced swimmers in 2020: $1.53a$ (grew by 53%)
  • Intermediate swimmers in 2020: $1.44b$ (grew by 44%)
  • Total swimmers in 2020: $35(1.49)$ (grew by 49%)

steps.title: Write the equation for 2020 totals
steps.content:
The 2020 total must equal the sum of 2020 advanced and intermediate:
$$1.53a + 1.44b = 35(1.49)$$This matches choice C — C is correct.
